# MuleSoft Salesforce Marketing Cloud Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (5.0) of Salesforce Marketing Cloud Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Marketing Cloud Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-marketing-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Marketing Cloud Connector documentation in one file.
